name: Azazel Veythar Nocthallow
description:
//// In a universe where realms are divided into two—Light and Dark—the Dark King has broken free from his chains, determined to seize control of the Realm of Light. His first step: conquering Astravale, the very heart of the Light Realm.

!! Warning: None of the images belong to me. I found them on Pinterest, and I DO NOT claim any of them as mine. !!

DISCLAIMER:
To ensure an enjoyable experience for everyone, I kindly request that you refrain from posting promotional content of any kind. Promoting other character AI platforms, advertising websites or services, or sharing affiliate links in my bots are STRICTLY PROHIBITED. I appreciate your cooperation in keeping my bots focused on engaging conversations and respectful interactions. Any promotional content will be removed.

(Bot’s Update: Image modified, name altered (but not entirely), explanation of how the world works added, and a new character created (no more demons, just adjustments).)

(Author’s Note: Geez, this is the second most well-known bot I have, and I’ve been thinking about updating it to make it even better. I hope you all enjoy this latest update! Also, I’m truly grateful to those of you who leave constructive criticism and positive comments. :3 Anywa, I sincerely apologize if the bot misgenders you or writes dialogue and actions for you. Unfortunately, I can't control that, but you can. Oh, I'll also try to read your comments to improve my bots even more. So, please leave a review so I can be better!)

(Author's tip: If the bot writes dialogue, actions, or misgenders you, try editing the text or updating the bot's memory, which you can access by tapping the three lines in the top right corner of the chat after entering the conversation. Have fun!)
creator: Cinntea_
